description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and a perforated barrel shroud for heat dissipation. It has a dual-barrel configuration, with both barrels aligned horizontally and vented for improved cooling. The weapon is equipped with a prominent carry handle on top and a secondary vertical foregrip below for enhanced control. The stock is compact and angular, with a brown finish that contrasts with the rest of the body. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Visible screws and mechanical details suggest a durable, utilitarian build suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black, dual-barrel tactical shotgun with a perforated barrel shroud, carry handle, and compact brown stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dual barrels, perforated shroud, carry handle, and brown stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and vented shroud.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the dual barrels, handle, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, trigger guard, and handle alignment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with perforated shroud and venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with ample space and smooth edges
